# Vim Plug

* [github repo](https://github.com/junegunn/vim-plug)


## March 26, 2026

I installed it using this command while in `~/.vim`:

```
$ curl -fLo pack/third-party/start/plug/autoload/plug.vim --create-dirs \
    https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junegunn/vim-plug/master/plug.vim
```

I added the vim-plug section in `vimrc` and then restarted vim (by re-opening the vimrc) and ran:

```
: PlugInstall
```
